title: Packit: Only create dist-git PRs for rawhide
body: We'll only be releasing breaking changes on rawhide so dist-git PRs should only be created for rawhide.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

@containers/skopeo-maintainers PTAL 

(not-quite-related) The ELN testing-farm job failure is being worked on by the TF folks.
